prompt: Create a hyper-realistic open-world crime video game screenshot in the style of a modern Miami-inspired beach club mission scene, captured in bright midday sunlight with a clear blue sky. Show a third-person gameplay-like composition with {argument name="character description" default="a young adult man with short dark hair, light skin, wearing a plain black t-shirt and patterned swim shorts"} seated casually in the foreground on pale sand, turned slightly to the side as if the player camera stopped near him. Place him large in frame, off-center left, with natural relaxed body posture. Behind him, depict an upscale beachfront club with exactly 3 white cabanas with flowing curtains visible across the sand, multiple tall palm trees, turquoise ocean water on the left, and an art-deco hotel strip on the right with pastel facades and neon accents. Populate the beach with a lively crowd of exactly 12 background people in swimwear: some standing and chatting, some walking near the shoreline, and exactly 2 seated at a dining table on the right with food and drinks. Include white lounge furniture, umbrellas, and a polished social party atmosphere. Add a convincing video game HUD overlay: a square mini-map in the bottom-left labeled {argument name="map label" default="GPS Route"}, weapon and control icons in the bottom-right, and a money counter in the top-right reading {argument name="money amount" default="$45,670"}. The overall feel should resemble a next-gen Grand Theft Auto VI gameplay screenshot, cinematic but clearly in-game, with sharp environmental detail, realistic shadows, vibrant coastal color grading, and subtle satirical luxury-beach energy in {argument name="city setting" default="Vice City"}.
translatedPrompt: 创作一张超逼真的开放世界犯罪类电子游戏截图，风格参考现代迈阿密风格的海滩俱乐部任务场景，画面呈现于明亮的午后阳光下，天空湛蓝。采用类似第三人称游戏视角的构图，前景中坐着 {argument name="character description" default="一位留着深色短发、肤色白皙的年轻男子，身穿纯黑色 T 恤和印花泳裤"}，他随意地坐在浅色沙滩上，身体微微侧向一旁，仿佛玩家视角在他身旁停下。将他置于画面左侧偏中心位置，占据较大比例，姿态自然放松。在他身后，描绘一个高档海滩俱乐部，沙滩上清晰可见 3 个带有飘逸窗帘的白色凉亭，种植着多棵高大的棕榈树，左侧是绿松石色的海水，右侧是一排具有装饰艺术风格的酒店，外墙呈柔和色调并带有霓虹装饰。海滩上布满了 12 位身着泳装的背景人群：有人站着聊天，有人在岸边行走，另有 2 人坐在右侧的餐桌旁享用餐饮。画面包含白色休闲家具、遮阳伞，营造出精致的社交派对氛围。添加逼真的游戏 HUD 界面：左下角是一个标有 {argument name="map label" default="GPS 路线"} 的方形小地图，右下角显示武器和控制图标，右上角显示金额为 {argument name="money amount" default="$45,670"} 的金钱计数器。整体观感应类似于次世代《Grand Theft Auto VI》的游戏截图，具有电影感且呈现出明显的游戏内质感，细节丰富、阴影真实、色彩分级充满活力的海岸气息，并带有 {argument name="city setting" default="罪恶都市"} 中那种微妙的奢华海滩讽刺感。

breakdown.creativeCore: GTA 风格海滩俱乐部游戏截图：一张逼真的次世代开放世界游戏截图，展示了位于热闹奢华海滩俱乐部的可玩角色，非常适合制作 GTA 风格的宣传视觉图或社交媒体对比图。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；包含标注/说明
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 城市美食地图、活动导览、园区地图、旅行视觉
breakdown.whySelected: 得分 67；风格: realistic, cinematic, luxury；要求精确文字；包含标注/说明

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 信息图/图解 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, cinematic, luxury]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: neon, camera]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
